title: Explore config model + persistence (core::explore::config)
description: New core module core::explore with config.rs: ExploreConfig { provider (Ollama|LlamaCpp), base_url, model, mode (Standard|Balanced|Aggressive), allowed_tools } with serde load/save/validate against project-local .grove/explore.json. Defaults: Ollama at http://localhost:11434/v1. Descriptive errors on missing/invalid config. Unit tests: round-trip, defaults, validation. grove-core stays clap-free. No fastcontext naming anywhere.
